   description: Captain Branson conducts a final pre-departure briefing amid a tense atmosphere, asserting authority while being observed by Keith Ellason. Forty-five days into the journey, a reported assault on June Failright sparks outrage, leading the Third Quadrant to demand action from Branson, who refuses to intervene.
